description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious wooden shelves supported by a dark metal frame. The frame is reinforced with prominent X-shaped crossbars on the sides, adding both structural stability and a distinctive visual element. The wood appears to be stained a deep brown, with visible grain patterns that give it a rustic, weathered look. The metal frame is constructed from thick, riveted steel, with large corner brackets and exposed bolts for an urban, utilitarian aesthetic. The open design allows for easy access from the front and back, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in garages, workshops, or loft-style interiors. There are no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an open shelving unit.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with three dark wooden shelves and a reinforced metal frame featuring X-shaped side supports. The open design and rugged materials give it a utilitarian, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the X-shaped metal crossbars and three open wooden shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelves and the solid metal frame without crossbars.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, with X-shaped metal crossbars and open shelving.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and structure of the shelves without crossbars.
